about.body: Born in the kitchens of Madrid, ARDOR brings the untamed spirit of Spanish cuisine to every plate. We cook with charcoal, patience, and a relentless obsession with flavour — from the finest Ibérico to the freshest coastal catch.

items.name: Paella Valenciana
items.description: Saffron bomba rice, free-range rabbit, green beans, slow-cooked over orange wood fire.
items.alt: Paella Valenciana served in a wide pan

items.name: Secreto Ibérico
items.description: Hidden cut of pure-bred Ibérico pork, charcoal grilled, Pedro Ximénez reduction, roasted peppers.
items.alt: Grilled Ibérico pork with reduction sauce

items.name: Gambas al Ajillo
items.description: Wild Atlantic prawns, sizzling in garlic, guindilla chilli, dry sherry, served in a clay cazuela.
items.alt: Sizzling garlic prawns in a clay dish

drinks.title: The Bar
drinks.blurb: Handcrafted cocktails inspired by the flavours of Spain. Each glass tells a story.

items.name: Sangria Ardiente
items.label: Signature
items.description: Tempranillo, blood orange, cinnamon, vanilla, seasonal berries.

items.name: Cava Blanco
items.label: Refreshing
items.description: Cava Brut, elderflower, cucumber, fresh mint, splash of tonic.

items.name: Fuego Negro
items.label: Bold
items.description: Mezcal, activated charcoal, smoked honey syrup, lime, chilli salt rim.

tapas.name: Pan con Tomate
tapas.desc: Sourdough, grated heirloom tomato, Arbequina oil, sea salt

tapas.name: Patatas Bravas
tapas.desc: Crispy potatoes, smoky bravas sauce, garlic alioli

tapas.name: Croquetas de Jamón
tapas.desc: Hand-rolled jamón ibérico croquettes, béchamel, crispy crumb

tapas.name: Pimientos de Padrón
tapas.desc: Blistered Padrón peppers, flor de sal, lemon

mains.name: Paella Valenciana
mains.desc: Saffron bomba rice, rabbit, beans, orange wood fire (for 2)

mains.name: Secreto Ibérico
mains.desc: Charcoal-grilled Ibérico pork, PX reduction, peppers

mains.name: Lubina a la Sal
mains.desc: Whole sea bass baked in salt crust, garlic butter, capers

mains.name: Cochinillo Asado
mains.desc: Segovian suckling pig, slow-roasted 6 hours, apple compote

postres.name: Crema Catalana
postres.desc: Classic custard, caramelised crust, orange zest

postres.name: Churros con Chocolate
postres.desc: Fried dough, cinnamon sugar, thick dark chocolate dipping sauce

postres.name: Tarta de Santiago
postres.desc: Almond cake, powdered sugar cross, Pedro Ximénez ice cream

bebidas.name: Sangria Ardiente
bebidas.desc: House red wine, blood orange, cinnamon, berries

bebidas.name: Rioja Reserva
bebidas.desc: Bodegas Muga, aged 18 months in oak, deep cherry notes

bebidas.name: Agua de Valencia
bebidas.desc: Fresh orange juice, Cava, vodka, gin — Valencia's signature

reservations.title: Book a Table
reservations.blurb: Reserve your table at ARDOR. We look forward to welcoming you.
reservations.successBody: A confirmation will be sent to your email.
